response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and demonstrable code fluency across multiple languages including DLang and TypeScript, but lacks explicit AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform leadership, or advanced AI education — key requirements for a principal engineer role focused on AI strategy.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial track record with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Deep full-stack engineering fluency across languages, cloud (AWS CDK), and infrastructure (Kubernetes, Docker)
Strong technical communication and knowledge-sharing via workshops and public projects
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product development or published AI platforms beyond basic agent tooling
Lacks advanced degree in AI or related field; education is BS in CS without AI specialization
Limited evidence of strategic cloud product roadmap leadership or customer advisory experience
